Annotation Type Masked

@Target({FIELD,PARAMETER,METHOD}) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Documented public @interface Masked
Marks a method parameter, field, or return value as sensitive so that it is redacted before being written to any log output.

The masking is applied by:

  1. MaskedArgumentAspect — intercepts bean method calls and replaces the annotated argument's toString() representation before it reaches the logger.
  2. SigNozJsonEncoder — scans JSON log output for field names matching signoz.logging.masked-fields and replaces their values.

Usage on a method parameter: 

  public void login(String username, @Masked String password) {
      log.info("Login attempt for {}", username); // password not logged
  }

Usage on a field (masks the field value when the object is serialised into a log): 

  public class PaymentRequest {
      @Masked(strategy = MaskingStrategy.PARTIAL)
      private String cardNumber;
  }

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type

    Description
    static enum 
    Masked.MaskingStrategy
    Masking strategies available for @Masked.

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String
    pattern
    Custom regex pattern used when Masked.MaskingStrategy.REGEX is chosen.
    String
    replacement
    Custom replacement string used when Masked.MaskingStrategy.FULL is chosen.
    Masked.MaskingStrategy
    strategy
    The masking strategy to apply.

  • Element Details

    • strategy

      Masked.MaskingStrategy strategy
      The masking strategy to apply.
      Default:
      FULL

    • replacement

      String replacement
      Custom replacement string used when Masked.MaskingStrategy.FULL is chosen. Defaults to "***".
      Default:
      "***"

    • pattern

      String pattern
      Custom regex pattern used when Masked.MaskingStrategy.REGEX is chosen. The entire match is replaced with replacement().
      Default:
      ""
